title: narcissus triandrus subsp. lusitanicus
intro: Narcissus triandrus subsp. lusitanicus, also known as Lusitanian narcissus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Narcissus, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Narcissus triandrus subsp. lusitanicus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat digestive problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
